title: DreamFactory Service
description: A service configured in a DreamFactory instance, representing a connectable resource such as a database, file storage, remote API, or scripting endpoint.

name.description: Unique name for the service, used in API paths.

type.description: Service type name identifying the connector.

config.description: Service configuration object. Schema varies by service type.

created_date.description: Timestamp when the service was created.

last_modified_date.description: Timestamp when the service was last modified.
